data.body: scripts/setup.sh has KNOWN_AGENTS=(claude codex gemini openrouter) but openrouter was replaced by opencode in the codebase (src/lib/settings.ts SCANNABLE_AGENTS). The setup wizard will scan for the wrong binary. Should be KNOWN_AGENTS=(claude codex gemini opencode).
data.title: Setup: replace openrouter with opencode in KNOWN_AGENTS
